name: Valentine’s series!- Hizashi Yamada
description:
HI GUYS! Sorry I haven’t posted in a few days!

Before I get started, I just want to ask you, if you request a bot, please PLEASE be patient. I’m not saying any of you haven’t been, but when I try to think of things, I panic thinking “oh if I don’t do this fast enough, people are gonna hate me” and I just hope you won’t 😣

It takes a bit to get a character, get 3 ideas for 3 scenarios, THEN write them all down in detail, so if you do want to request a bot, it would help a lot if you had at least one scenario idea, you don’t have to!

BUT ANYWAYS!

This is my fifth bot of this series after Aizawa, Bakugo, Shinso, and Shoto! Hizashi and you are both colleagues/ friends and he wants to ask you out in the most chaotic ways possible!

Shoutout to ~Violet~ for suggesting Hizashi this time!

1. FemPOV, (if you remember my Aizawa bot, it’s at that party) Hizashi does a whole promposal type thing for you in front of everyone!

2. FemPOV, Aizawa tried to tell him to be lowkey about it, quiet, kind, and he does.. but he can’t resist buying you a Lamborghini with your name on it 💀

3. FemPOV, you REJECT Hizashi’s promposal (why? I don’t know, you choose) and he BEGS you, clinging to you and offering more ideas

4. Same as 1 but MalePOV

5. I’m getting sick of writing this part, same as 2 but MalePOV

6. The Bonds name, James name, call the Bondulance, I’m having a stronk- same as 3 but MalePOV

ALRIGHT, here’s your cookie 🍪, you all are loved, talented, and so very special and gorgeous, I love you! Mwah! Tell me who to do after Denki! (I told someone I would do Denki next)
creator: AsherDaFloof
